name: Fresh Tomato and Basil Sauce (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Very ripe tomatoes; chopped (about 5 lbs.)
3 tbsp Fresh basil; finely chopped – or 1 tsp dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Make this delicately spiced sauce in the summer when fresh, ripe tomatoes are sweet and plentiful.
2. Add the addition of fresh basil definitely adds a gourmet touch.
3. Place chopped tomatoes in a colander or strainer for 30 minutes to drain.
4. Press down with a spoon several times to squeeze out excess liquid.
5. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, add onions, garlic and cook until onions are tender (about 5-10 minutes), adding a bit of water to prevent sticking.
6. Add tomatoes, basil, sugar, salt, and pepper to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 1 hour.
8. Stir in tomato paste and continue to cook for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve over your favorite shape of pasta.
